title: Dark Forge's Create
description: We are working on a newer and more content-rich modpack
body: **In favor of our new modpack, we have decided to archive this project. We are working on a newer and more content-rich modpack, which will be released in Q2 2026.** ![Dark Forge's Create Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9870e1321e012f026e66652d6b1f3f4d4d7e3916_0.webp) # A Create focused modpack made by the Dark Forge team Dark Forge's Create is a modpack that adds a ton of new ways to experience Create. Ranging from new blocks, mechanics, and items to new biomes and graphics, all of this allows you to unlock a new dimension of creativity in your next Minecraft world. We primarily focused on providing you with new content but keeping things as simple as possible. ## Includes - see our [gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/okamicrafts-create/gallery) - Ships - Cannons - Optimisation - Decorations - New terain - Shaders - Create QOL addons ## Installation - With e4mc included, you can easily host your own world if your PC can handle it. Here's how: 1. Open a world to LAN in Minecraft. 1. e4mc will automatically provide you with a server address you can share with other players. - [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app) - Third party Launcher: To install and play the modpack with the .mrpack file, follow the instructions [here](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth). - Server side - All server-side mods and files are available on my [GitHub](https://github.com/Kemilab/OKAMIcraft-Create), and updated as the modpack updates ## All included mods are found [here](https://moddermore.net/list/XflMr4xK4JyH) ![If you are a mod developer and have issues with out mod pack contact us via form](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2cf55cc07ee7129cbf43c6c83d63e23777e8ad.png) ## LINKS ![Website Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Discord button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ba5b8444bad6549509287c8ccd717887151e0b.png) ![Updates Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png)
